flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Universidad del Sagrado Corazon rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.8k → $16.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Universidad del Sagrado Corazon rose 146% between 2021 and 2024 (9.4% → 23.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Universidad del Sagrado Corazon fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Universidad del Sagrado Corazon rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (41.2% → 52.1%).
